# ctrlplane_environment (Data Source)

Fetch an existing environment by name within the configured workspace.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the environment to look up

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the environment
- `id` (String) The ID of the environment
- `metadata` (Map of String) The metadata of the environment
- `resource_selector` (String) CEL expression used to select resources
